examples: The N-isopropylacrylamide and the polyvinyl alcohol are respectively 5 percent and 25percent by weight percent.
Seaman specializes in polymer clay, which really isn't clay at all, but polymer polyvinyl chloride.
Polyvinyl chloride, also known as PVC or "vinyl," has become one of the most widely used plastics today.
Chlorine's largest use is as an ingredient in polyvinyl chloride, PVC being almost as popular a plastic as polyethylene.
The principal product is polyvinyl chloride resin, which is supplied to downstream subsidiaries to manufacture and market end-user industrial and consumer products.
